title: L&T Energy Tech Wins IOC's First Green H2 Tender
content: L&T Energy Green Tech has won a bid to build a 10,000 tonnes per annum green hydrogen plant at Indian Oil Corporation's (IOCL) Panipat refinery in Haryana. L&T Energy Green Tech will supply green hydrogen at â‚¹397 ($4.67) per kg with 18% GST (goods and services tax. The green hydrogen project is to be set up on a build, own operate (BOO) basis for 25 years.
author: Analysts Account
